prompt: I want to add EIP-5792 batch transaction support to my SE-2 dApp. Create an ERC20 token contract and a frontend page where users can approve and transfer tokens in a single batch transaction using wallet_sendCalls.
assertions: Uses useWriteContracts hook (not useSendCalls or custom encoding)
Uses useCapabilities for wallet EIP-5792 support detection
Uses useShowCallsStatus for batch transaction status display
Provides graceful fallback for wallets without EIP-5792 support
Batch button conditionally disabled when wallet doesn't support EIP-5792
ERC20 smart contract with approve+transfer pattern created
Frontend page with batch UI created
Uses SE-2 scaffold hooks for contract interaction
No new npm dependencies needed (wagmi already has EIP-5792 hooks)
